AggregationDataResultDc.description: Describes data contract of aggregation result.

columnName.description: The name of the column in the data table that holds the attribute values.

isEditable.description: If set to false, editing of the attribute value will be prohibited.

isDisplayed.description: If false, attribute will not be returned in feature query.

clientData.description: Client data storage. Storage isn't used by server.

referenceId.description: Id of table given attribute is referenced.

AttributeConfigurationDc.description: Configuration of an attribute in a feature layer.

count.description: Count of this attribute value at table.

scalingFactor.description:
Sets number scaling factor.

In case, source value is 1 000 000 and scaling factor is 0.001 formatted value to be in hundred - 1000.

format.description:
Template to format attribute value.

Format numeric: http://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/standard/base-types/custom-numeric-format-strings .

Format date and time: http://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/standard/base-types/custom-date-and-time-format-strings .
<para></para>
<example>
  `#,#` - Causes value to be split into groups
            ```
1234567890 -> 1 234 567 890
            
````.00` - Causes the value to be rounded.
            ```
123.446 -> 123.45
            
````#,#.00` - Causes value to be split into groups and rounded.
            ```
1234567.4563 - > 1 234 567.46
            
```</example>

culture.description:
Set formatting culture. If not set, default culture is Current.
Receive formatted value in different culture.

Current culture is culture specified by default on machine (en-US, ru-RU).
Invariant is culture-independent culture.
Specific cultures: ru-RU, en-US.
If specific culture has invalid name 400 error returns.

ServiceInfoDc.description: The `ServiceInfoDc` provides information about the service.

owner.description: System name of the resource owner.

ownerName.description: User name of the resource owner (human friendly name).

createdDate.description: The date and time the resource was created.

changedDate.description: The date and time the resource was modified the last time.

minResolution.description:
Minimum resolution that this service will be rendered on. If no resolution limits are set for the top-level
style of the service, or if no such property is available for this type of the service, 0 is returned.

maxResolution.description:
Maximum resolution that this service will be rendered on. If no resolution limits are set for the top-level
style of the service, or if no such property is available for this type of the service, 0 is returned.

condition.description:
Filtering condition for the objects in the service. If no condition set or if no such property is available
for the given service type, null is returned.

ServiceListItemDc.description: An entry in the service list response.

scaleItems.description: Snap grid cell size by scale.

simplifyPreserveCollapsed.description: The "preserve collapsed" flag will retain objects that would otherwise be too small given the tolerance.

StatusResponseDc.description: Represents the current status of a connected storage.

TableConfigurationType.description: Specifies the available types of table configurations that can be used within the application.

createdDate.description: The date when resource was created.

changedDate.description: The date when resource was last modified.

icon.description: Base64 encoded image - icon of the resource. Usually shown next to the resource name in lists and legends.

name.description: Name of the resource including its namespaces (names of the service managers that contain this service).

useAnd.description:
AND vs OR. The AND operator displays a record if all the conditions are TRUE.
The OR operator displays a record if any of the conditions are TRUE.

TaskResourceUpdateDto.description:
Represents the base class for updating task resource configurations, providing essential properties for task
resource updates.

TileCatalogServiceInfoDc.description: Service info for a tile catalog layer service.

TileCatalogTableConfigurationDc.description: Configuration of a table for tile catalog layer.

buffer.description: Buffer size in tile coordinate space for geometry clippig. Defaults to 256.

clipGeometry.description: Control if geometries are clipped or encoded as-is. Defaults to true.

TileGeometryClippingInfoDc.description: Tile geometry clipping information data contract.

origin.description: The zero point of the coordinates from which tiles are counted.

reversedY.description: If true, positive side of 'Y' coordinate, will be in the reverse side.

dpi.description: The dpi of the tiling schema.

height.description: Height of each tile in pixels.

width.description: Height of each tile in pixels.

tilesSubDomains.description:
A list of subdomains.<example>a,b,c</example>. Subdomains are used to distribute tile requests across multiple servers.
<example> http://{subDomain}.evergis/{x}/{y}/{z}.png</example>.

lods.description: List of levels of detail that define the tiling schema.

columnsAdd.description: Description of table columns what must be added.

columnsDelete.description: Table columns what must be deleted.

UpdateTableDc.description: Table description with columns what must be added and deleted.

is_open_last_project.description: Whether to open the last used project when opening a client.

updated.description: Last project update date and time.

is_open_last_project.description: Whether to open the last used project when opening a client.

is_active.description: If the user account is active or not.

isRole.description: true if item is role otherwise false.

ViewConfigurationDc.description: Configuration of a table for feature layer.

maxFeaturesInOneTable.description: Max features count in one table in workspace.

maxEqlQueryParametersValues.description: Maximum number of rows that a user can quering by eql parameter query.

deleteZipAfterExtraction.description: If true delete archive after extraction.

basic.description: Basic authorization header using the Basic scheme.
